arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk on TV for free in tonight's Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal vs Shakhtar is the latest Champions League match to be shown live on Amazon Prime Video

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt Diogo Jota injury blow as five players miss training before Arsenal
arts.sum: Arne Slot, whose side face Arsenal at the Emirates on Sunday, had expressed concerns about Trent Alexander-Arnold and Alexis Mac Allister after the Chelsea clash, but both were present at training . Liverpool could be without Diogo Jota for their Champions League clash against RB Leipzig, with the 27-year-old forward absent from training on Tuesday afternoon .

arts.ttl: Arsenal interested in clever transfer that could save millions with January agreement
arts.sum: Arsenal are one of two Premier League clubs who are reportedly showing an interest in young Aston Villa goalkeeper Oliwier Zych. Zych has been included in Villa’s first-team matchday squad on three occasions so far this season, including in the Champions League clash against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed title boost as Man City given concerning double injury update
arts.sum: "It's not a big issue but he doesn't feel completely fine and Kevin is not 22 years old anymore," he said, via the Manchester Evening News . Pep Guardiola is still uncertain about when Kevin De Bruyne will make his return for Arsenal title rivals Manchester City, five weeks after sustaining what was initially described as a minor injury.

arts.ttl: Premier League appeal ruling makes mockery of VAR as Arsenal make William Saliba red card decision - Lee Wilmot
arts.sum: Arsenal have made the decision not to appeal against William Saliba's red card against Bournemouth on Saturday. Arteta seemed slightly perturbed by the VAR getting involved when he said: "The referee decided to give a yellow and then a red card.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard provides Arsenal injury update ahead of Liverpool clash to boost hope of return
arts.sum: “I’ve been working very hard on my recovery in the past few weeks, and missing out on big Champions League nights like this just makes me more determined and motivated to get back as soon as possible,” Odegaard wrote. But in general, it’s getting better and I feel like I’m getting closer now.

arts.ttl: Report: Mikel Arteta really wants to sign 'incredible' £50m striker for Arsenal with potential deal possible
arts.sum: Arsenal are already drawing up plans for the upcoming transfer windows and are likely to be in the market for a striker. A world-class player...

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard has shared injury update ahead of Arsenal's clash with Shakhtar Donetsk tonight
arts.sum: Arsenal have been without captain Martin Odegaard since the September international break. The Gunners star suffered an ankle injury while on international duty with Norway...

arts.ttl: Jack Wilshere breaks silence on leaving Arsenal as former midfielder agrees deal to leave Under 18s role to become assistant manager at Norwich
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere is set to leave Arsenal as the Gunners' former midfielder has agreed a deal to join Championship side Norwich's coaching team.

arts.ttl: 'For sure': Charles Watts shares behind scenes injury claim on Bukayo Saka ahead of Shakhtar clash
arts.sum: Work is going on at London Colney... 😬
